medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.Conn.Docs: The number of seconds to wait before retrying a connection to the CDN if the connection is lost.

medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.File.Docs: The size, in seconds, of the file cache for streaming outputs.

medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.Http.Docs: Specifies whether to use chunked transfer encoding to Akamai. To enable this feature, contact Akamai.

medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.NumR.Docs: The number of retry attempts that will be made before the channel is put into an error state.

medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.Rest.Docs: If a streaming output fails, the number of seconds to wait until a restart is initiated. A value of 0 means never restart.

medialive.channel.hlsakamaisettings.Toke.Docs: The token parameter for authenticated Akamai. If this is not specified, _gda_ is used.
